visual_frame_rules: Stop-scroll elements: The contrasting gestures (playful peace signs) with stern expression and professional attire creates curiosity about context; bright teal background with yellow highlighted word 'TRUNK' draws eye; Bold red £300/MONTH text with 'GONE' creates immediate financial fear/FOMO, relatable money stress depicted through simple panicked character

Unease sources: The double peace signs gesture combined with a serious facial expression creates cognitive dissonance; the instructional text about emptying trunk feels oddly specific and slightly ominous; distressed stick figure with hands on head expressing panic/shock about money loss, the 'GONE' text with alarming emoji creates financial anxiety
kling_base_prompt_additions: Natural mirror selfie composition with realistic phone positioning and hand grip
The YouTube thumbnail style with overlaid graphics, text, and bar chart is consistent with real content creator productions
The typography and layout follows standard YouTube thumbnail conventions with proper text rendering and gradient overlays typical of real video content
Natural lighting and shadows on the subject's face and clothing are consistent with a real indoor studio/podcast setting
Authentic video compression artifacts and text overlay typical of social media content creation
Natural hand positioning and skin texture with realistic watch detail and lighting on wrist
Realistic lighting with natural shadows and highlights consistent with indoor ambient lighting, plus authentic motion blur on the hand holding food
The woman's face shows natural skin texture, age-appropriate wrinkles, and realistic glasses reflections consistent with real photography
Authentic currency band wrapping and paper money texture with consistent lighting and shadows across multiple bill stacks
Natural lighting and shadows on the faces of the podcast participants are consistent with studio recording equipment
Genuine environmental details including architectural moldings, furniture, and natural lighting consistent with real indoor filming
Natural video call compression artifacts and lighting inconsistencies typical of real webcam footage
Natural smartphone selfie perspective with realistic motion blur and casual framing typical of authentic social media video content
The person's face shows natural skin texture, lighting, and realistic facial features with genuine expression
Natural skin texture, pores, and subtle facial imperfections visible on the woman's face
Authentic interior environment with consistent lighting, natural shadows, and believable furniture/decor details
Natural lighting with realistic room ambiance and shadows from practical lights in background
The overlaid text graphics, timestamps, and YouTube-style interface elements are typical of real social media video content

no sunset or dusk backgrounds visible through windows
no coffee mugs or domestic objects

instructions:
SLOT 4 DIRECTIVE — MECHANISM ANGLE

The market is saturated with tutorial content. Take the mechanism angle instead: expose the exact mechanism — name the system, name the institution, name the rate.

The audience is feeling: 'Can GP choose to not call a patient for a phone appointment that they don't like?' — they sense this but have no words for it. Give them the words. Be exact. Name the mechanism, the institution, the number.

EXPERIMENT (mechanism_specificity): change only this one variable from the previous slot. Everything else stays constant. Document in experiments.json.
